title: populus balsamifera var. angustifolia
intro: Populus balsamifera var. angustifolia, also known as Rocky Mountain Balsam Poplar, is a variety of the Balsam Poplar tree native to North America. The bark, twigs, and leaves of this plant possess medicinal properties, containing compounds like salicin, which is similar in structure to aspirin. The health benefits of Populus balsamifera var. angustifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties, making it a potential remedy for pain relief, fever reduction, and wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
